category_sources: source_facts.description: Convert filesystem entry names from NFD to NFC for cross-platform compatibility.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo points to the official GitHub project; README is the best available official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies NFD-to-NFC filesystem entry-name conversion; source_facts.executables lists CLI tools.
